betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The grat ideas about reality. From the extremely large to the extremely small.
All is part of a whole that beckons recognition, acknowledgement, and intimacy.
The laws of nature, true in their bareness, and yet hidden away.
The creative art of discovery, of thinking what nobody has thought before, to relate the seemingly unrelated, and to be willing to content with the truth.
The science of theory, of models, of equations, of proofs.
The creativity of the Arbiter, missing, but now being brought back.
